## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it matter?

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue included (`Closes #...` when appropriate)
- [ ] Docs or README updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Tests added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] No unrelated files or generated artifacts included
- [ ] Live LinkedIn validation followed the documented safety rules

## Notes for Reviewers

- Risks, follow-ups, or rollout notes:
